title: nolletia annemarieae
intro: Nolletia annemarieae, also known as Annemarieae's Nolletia, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family (Asteraceae). This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits associated with Nolletia annemarieae include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support the immune system. The plant is typically prepared for medicinal use through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be consumed orally or applied topically to the affected area.
